channel.title: World - Latest - Google News
channel.copyright: Copyright © 2026 Google. All rights reserved. This XML feed is made available solely for the purpose of rendering Google News results within a personal feed reader for personal, non-commercial use. Any other use of the feed is expressly prohibited. By accessing this feed or using these results in any manner whatsoever, you agree to be bound by the foregoing restrictions.

item.title: Trump’s Board of Peace drops full Gaza recovery plan in favour of tiny pilot scheme - The Guardian
item.description:
1. Trump’s Board of Peace drops full Gaza recovery plan in favour of tiny pilot scheme  The Guardian
  2. Peace President Trump Humiliated as Another Plan Collapses  The Daily Beast
  3. Palestinians in Gaza: Stuck between Hamas and Israel  DW.com
  4. Exclusive | Trump Wanted 20,000 Peacekeeping Troops in Gaza. He Is Starting With 10 to 20.  WSJ
  5. Trump’s ‘Board of Peace’ wanted to rebuild Gaza as a futuristic metropolis. It’s still stalled on a refugee camp  The Independent

item.title: Russian Offensive Campaign Assessment, July 15, 2026 - Institute for the Study of War
item.description:
1. Russian Offensive Campaign Assessment, July 15, 2026  Institute for the Study of War
  2. Russian strike on Ukraine's Odesa kills three as Moscow, Kyiv battle over Black Sea  Reuters
  3. Russia Shifts Its Focus to the Black Sea  Foreign Policy
  4. Russia attacks Odesa as von der Leyen arrives in Kyiv  politico.eu
  5. Missile strike on Odesa: Injury toll climbs to three, one dead  Ukrinform
item.source: Institute for the Study of War

item.title: Law expanding gender segregation in academia passes; sponsor claims it will advance women - The Times of Israel
item.description:
1. Law expanding gender segregation in academia passes; sponsor claims it will advance women  The Times of Israel
  2. Haredi women, academics file petition against Israel's new gender-segregated education law  The Jerusalem Post
  3. Knesset Approves Bill Allowing Single-sex University Programs Through Doctoral Studies  i24NEWS
  4. The Law Expanding Gender Separation in Higher Education and Its Implications  The Israel Democracy Institute
  5. RELEASE: As the Knesset Weighs Proposed Legislation on Gender Segregation, NCJW Warns Bill Threatens Women’s Equality in Israeli Universities  National Council of Jewish Women |

item.title: Even If Ukraine Doesn't Recapture Crimea, Kyiv Has Damaged Russia's Credibility - The Moscow Times
item.description:
1. Even If Ukraine Doesn't Recapture Crimea, Kyiv Has Damaged Russia's Credibility  The Moscow Times
  2. Russia is losing its grip on Crimea  The Economist
  3. Ukrainian strikes on Crimea’s energy facilities have left towns without water, and volunteers are stepping up  Meduza
  4. Fires break out in occupied Crimea following drone attack near Dzhankoi and Chongar bridge – social media  Ukrinform
  5. Ukraine Cripples Crimea’s Power Backbone, Striking One of Russia’s Largest Energy Hubs on the Peninsula  UNITED24 Media

item.title: The Hunt for the Counterfeiter Trying to Make the Perfect Bill - The New York Times
item.description: The Hunt for the Counterfeiter Trying to Make the Perfect Bill  The New York Times

item.title: Ukraine targets Moscow with 200 drones in large-scale attack, mayor says - ABC News - Breaking News, Latest News and Videos
item.description:
1. Ukraine targets Moscow with 200 drones in large-scale attack, mayor says  ABC News - Breaking News, Latest News and Videos
  2. Russian regions report deaths, injuries after another night of Ukrainian drone attacks  Reuters
  3. Putin’s Spiraling Crisis Exposed by Russia’s Military Records  The Daily Beast
  4. Fire Erupts at Russia’s Strategic Engels Air Base After Large-Scale Drone Strike  Kyiv Post
  5. At Least 3 Killed in Ukrainian Attacks Across Russia  The Moscow Times
item.source: ABC News - Breaking News, Latest News and Videos

item.title: As Putin loses confidence in his military, Ukraine presses harder - The Hill
item.description:
1. As Putin loses confidence in his military, Ukraine presses harder  The Hill
  2. Russians are growing anxious and angry  The Economist
  3. EXCLUSIVE: Putin likely to escalate Ukraine war, despite Trump peace push, sources say  Reuters
  4. As Russia’s assault continues, Ukraine’s politics shift and an old alliance begins to fray  The Guardian
  5. Putin’s next move will be Baltic incursion, warns top Russian dissident  politico.eu

item.title: 'F**k You Donnie': Canadians Aren't Happy With Trump For Sharing This Bonkers Image - HuffPost
item.description:
1. 'F**k You Donnie': Canadians Aren't Happy With Trump For Sharing This Bonkers Image  HuffPost
